productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Mushroom Brown Shoes
description: Style NoteLend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear.Product DetailsMushroom brown slip on shoe, with inlays, overlays, elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongue and perforations on the sidesPadded tongue and inner Thick rubber midsole with branding embossed on the lateral side and stitch detailingTPU outsole with multi directional lugs, arched midfoot and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under direct sunlight
